personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | API Integrations, Cloud Pipelines & Lakehouse Architecture
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience designing and building scalable batch and real-time data solutions. Expert in Python, PySpark, and SQL with deep AWS cloud experience (S3, Glue, Redshift, Athena, ECS). Built and maintained API connectors ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints into Oracle and cloud data stores. Hands-on with lakehouse architecture (Delta Lake, Medallion patterns, Parquet/Snappy columnar storage), data quality validation frameworks, and Airflow orchestration. Proven record delivering reliable, governed, enterprise-grade data pipelines in regulated banking environments.

skills.name: GenAI / LLM Agents (RAG, FAISS, Sentence Transformers)

bullets: Built and maintained API connectors ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints (BMC TrueSight, TSCO, AppDynamics APIs) into Oracle and AWS data stores — automated, self-healing, and fully documented.
Designed ETL/ELT pipelines in Python and PySpark to ingest, clean, transform, and enrich raw telemetry into analytics-ready datasets for executive dashboards and ML forecasting workloads.

Built hybrid AWS lakehouse platform: S3 landing zone for raw telemetry ingestion, AWS Glue for ETL transformation, Redshift for analytics and forecasting — with Parquet/Snappy columnar storage and Athena query optimization.
Implemented automated data quality validation rules and pipeline monitoring using Python and pandas; proactively resolved integrity issues before they reached downstream consumers or reporting.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on AWS ECS/EC2 for scalable on-demand processing; built robust logging, error handling, and alerting for all pipeline stages.
Applied statistical analysis and ML (Prophet, scikit-learn) on capacity telemetry to identify underutilized infrastructure patterns, driving hardware consolidation and measurable cost savings.
experience.title: Senior Data Engineer

Upgraded Dynatrace (6.5 to 7.0), implemented TLS 1.2 security, and supported AWS cloud migration.
Built end-to-end monitoring dashboards delivering before/after performance metrics for stakeholder reporting.

Installed JMX, Thread Dumps, and Wily Introscope for enhanced pipeline monitoring; created automation scripts to streamline testing workflows.
experience.title: Performance Test Engineer

Built CPPUNIT testing framework to automate conversion validation and ensure data integrity across the migration.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic pipeline in Python orchestrating 10+ automated steps: API integrations, semantic duplicate detection (FAISS vector embeddings), LLM-powered scoring, resume/cover letter generation, quality gating, and application tracking. Implements RAG-style retrieval with sentence-transformers and event-driven step orchestration.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a full serverless data platform using S3 + Glue + Athena + Bedrock. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI agent using Claude 3 Sonnet. Resolved small-file problem using Snappy + Parquet columnar compression. Optimized ETL and data access for enterprise scale.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Replaced legacy manual forecasting with a parallel generator-based Python/PySpark pipeline, reducing forecasting cycles by 90%. Built Prophet and scikit-learn models predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead. Created interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights.
